name: munea
description: Munea iOS-first AI health-care companion app prototype.

scripts.test:hosting: npm run test:seo && npx firebase-tools@15.23.0 emulators:exec --only hosting "node scripts/test-firebase-hosting-live.js"
scripts.hosting:deploy: npm run test:hosting && npx firebase-tools@15.23.0 deploy --only hosting:public --project gen-lang-client-0229303523
scripts.test:launch: python engine/test_vitals_sync.py && python engine/test_wellbeing_mood_key.py && python engine/test_medication_doses.py && python engine/test_medication_photo_privacy.py && python engine/test_family_relays.py && python engine/test_voice_call_memory.py && python engine/test_voice_call_diagnostics.py && python engine/test_live_lookup.py && python engine/test_voice_style_rules.py && python engine/test_voice_echo_guard.py && python engine/test_notification_platform.py && python engine/test_notification_settings.py && python engine/test_apns_service.py && python engine/test_thin_door.py && python engine/test_ai_rate_limit.py && python engine/test_admin_security_headers.py && python engine/test_cors_contract.py && python engine/test_account_scope.py && python engine/test_request_scope.py && python engine/test_apple_store.py && python engine/test_privacy_export.py && python engine/test_free_signup_trial.py && python engine/test_family_invitation_access.py && python engine/test_subscription_expiry.py && python engine/test_localization.py && python engine/test_relationship_dialogue.py && python scripts/test_voice_chain_probe.py && node scripts/test-voice-launch-policy.js && node scripts/test-voice-turn-policy.js && node scripts/test-voice-call-diagnostics.js && node scripts/test-store-verification.js && node scripts/test-health-connection.js && node scripts/test-medication-service.js && node scripts/test-notification-platform.js && node scripts/test-cloud-sync-guard.js && node scripts/test-native-auth.js && node scripts/test-development-profile.js && node scripts/test-cloudrun-canary-contract.js && node scripts/test-service-watchdog.js && node scripts/test-release-settings.js && node scripts/test-ui-contracts.js
scripts.ios:package: npm run ios:archive && npm run ios:export
